pokemon.name: Porygon
pokemon.description: A POKéMON that consists entirely of programming code. Capable of moving freely in cyberspace.

models.profile: SymPy is not an LLM but a pure-Python computer-algebra library that deterministically manipulates symbols to emit template proofs. Porygon, the first wholly artificial Pokémon made entirely of programming code, mirrors this engineered, code-native, rule-driven artifact.

pokemon.name: Metagross
pokemon.description: METAGROSS has four brains in total. Combined, the four brains can breeze through difficult calculations faster than a supercomputer. This POKéMON can float in the air by tucking in its four legs.

models.profile: `decide` is not a model but a Lean 4 core tactic that proves decidable propositions by brute-force kernel computation, reducing a goal to a definitive true/false verdict. Metagross fits: its four-brain neural network outpaces a supercomputer, crunching data into one decisive, deterministic answer.

pokemon.name: Unown
pokemon.description: Their shapes look like hieroglyphs on ancient tablets. It is said that the two are somehow related.

models.profile: Unown's name literally reads as "unknown," matching an OpenRouter request whose underlying model is unidentified. Like Unown's 28 interchangeable forms, it can resolve to any of many models behind one hidden identity.

pokemon.name: Alakazam
pokemon.description: Its brain can outperform a supercomputer. Its intelligence quotient is said to be 5,000.

models.profile: Alakazam embodies raw intelligence and deep reasoning, mirroring Opus as Anthropic's most capable flagship model. Its ever-expanding psychic intellect matches Opus's deliberate, high-reasoning problem-solving.

pokemon.name: Porygon-Z
pokemon.description: Additional software was installed to make it a better Pokémon. It began acting oddly, however.

models.profile: Codex is a man-made, code-native agent, just as Porygon-Z is a fully digital, programmatically-upgraded Pokémon. Its rapidly-iterated, sometimes unpredictable agentic coding power mirrors Porygon-Z's overclocked, glitch-prone code.

pokemon.name: Reuniclus
pokemon.description: When Reuniclus shake hands, a network forms between their brains, increasing their psychic power.

models.profile: Reuniclus's gel-bound multiplying cells mirror Leanstral's sparse mixture-of-experts, and its supercomputer-grade intellect matches a Lean 4 agent built for rigorous formal proof. A calm, calculating mind that verifies rather than guesses.

pokemon.name: Hydreigon
pokemon.description: This brutal Pokémon travels the skies on its six wings. Anything that moves seems like a foe to it, triggering its attack.

models.profile: Hydreigon's three heads mirror Gemini 3.1 Pro's new three-tier thinking system, and as a powerful, multi-typed pseudo-legendary it captures this top-ranking, natively multimodal reasoning model. Its commanding, voracious nature reflects a frontier model that ingests text, audio, images, video, and whole code repositories at once.
